summary: Game States - Preview/Scheduled - Delayed - Hide Spoilers ON

steps.action:
WHEN a game is in a Preview/Scheduled state
AND the game is Delayed
AND one of the following statusCode's are present in the MAST response: (PV,PP,PY,PE,PA,PO,PR,PS,PG,PF,PC,PD,PB,PL,PI)
steps.result:
THEN a pill with the text "DELAYED" is not displayed above the team info in the Hero
AND only the game start time pill is displayed above the team matchup.
